pkgmetadata.longdescription: Elephant is a plugin-based data provider and action service for application launchers such as Walker. The daemon and selected Go providers are built together to preserve Go plugin ABI compatibility. The default installation includes Walker's default-query providers plus the provider-list and command-runner providers.

use.flag: Build the 1Password provider using app-admin/op-cli-bin or app-misc/1password-cli
Build the Bitwarden provider using app-admin/rbw
Build the bookmarks provider with browser bookmark import support
Build the Wayland clipboard history provider
Build the file index provider; this indexes the user's home directory when Elephant starts
Build the user-defined TOML and Lua menus provider
Build the Niri actions and session providers
Build the media player control provider
Build the locale-aware emoji and symbols provider
Build the task list and notification provider
Build the foreign-toplevel window switching provider
Build the PipeWire and WirePlumber audio device provider
